name: Natural Language fMRI Dataset (LeBel)
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds003020) of 8 participants listening to many hours of naturalistic spoken stories during fMRI. A large per-subject resource for building voxel-wise language encoding models.
citation: LeBel A, et al. (2023). A natural language fMRI dataset for voxelwise encoding models. Scientific Data, 10, 555.
